jobRoles.label: Network Engineer
jobRoles.summary: Designs, configures and operates LAN/WAN, routing and switching infrastructure.

jobRoles.label: VoIP Engineer
jobRoles.summary: Builds and supports voice platforms, SIP trunking and unified communications.

jobRoles.label: Linux Systems Administrator
jobRoles.summary: Administers Linux servers, services, automation and hardening.

jobRoles.label: Cloud Engineer
jobRoles.summary: Provisions and operates cloud workloads, networking and managed services.

jobRoles.label: DevOps Engineer
jobRoles.summary: Delivers CI/CD, infrastructure-as-code and platform automation.

jobRoles.label: Security Analyst
jobRoles.summary: Monitors, detects and responds to threats and hardens systems.

jobRoles.label: Integration Engineer
jobRoles.summary: Implements API gateways, message routing and enterprise integration.

jobRoles.label: Support Technician
jobRoles.summary: First and second-line support across desktop, network and voice.

complexityLevels.label: Beginner
complexityLevels.summary: No prior experience assumed; foundational concepts and guided tasks.

complexityLevels.label: Intermediate
complexityLevels.summary: Builds on fundamentals with realistic configuration and troubleshooting.

complexityLevels.label: Advanced
complexityLevels.summary: Complex, multi-component scenarios and design decisions.

complexityLevels.label: Expert
complexityLevels.summary: Production-grade architecture, optimisation and edge-case resolution.

durationBands.label: Short
durationBands.summary: Under 2 hours — a focused single sitting.

durationBands.label: Extended
durationBands.summary: 1–3 days — a deep scenario or mini-project.
